scenes.text: Introduction to Docker: Learn the basic concept of Docker as a platform for developing, shipping, and running applications using container technology.
scenes.image_prompt: graph LR; A[Docker Introduction] --> B[Containers]; A --> C[Images]; A --> D[Virtualization]

scenes.text: Understanding Containers: Explore how Docker containers are lightweight, standalone, and executable packages that include everything needed to run a piece of software.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TD; A[Containers] --> B[Lightweight]; A --> C[Standalone]; A --> D[Executable]

scenes.text: Docker Architecture: Delve into the architecture of Docker, including the Docker engine, client, daemon, and how they work together.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TD; A[Docker Client] --> B[Docker Daemon]; B --> C[Docker Engine]; C --> D[Containers]; C --> E[Images]

scenes.text: Docker Images: Explore how Docker images present a set of layers that are stacked on top of each other to form a container file system.
scenes.image_prompt: graph LR; A[Docker Images] --> B[Layers]; B --> C[File System]; C --> D[Container Creation]

scenes.text: Dockerfile Basics: Learn about Dockerfiles and how they are used to automate the process of creating Docker images.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TD; A[Dockerfile] --> B[Instructions]; B --> C[Image Creation]; C --> D[Automation]

scenes.text: Networking in Docker: Understand how Docker manages networking and connects containers, enabling communication between them.
scenes.image_prompt: graph LR; A[Docker Networking] --> B[Bridge Networks]; B --> C[Container Communication]; A --> D[Overlay Networks]

scenes.text: Docker Compose: Discover Docker Compose as a tool for defining and running multi-container Docker applications.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TD; A[Docker Compose] --> B[Define Applications]; B --> C[Multi-Container]; C --> D[Configurations]

scenes.text: Docker Swarm: Dive into Docker Swarm as a native clustering and orchestration tool for Docker containers.
scenes.image_prompt: graph LR; A[Docker Swarm] --> B[Clustering]; B --> C[Orchestration]; A --> D[Node Management]

scenes.text: Kubernetes vs Docker: Compare and contrast Kubernetes and Docker, understanding their relationship, differences, and use cases.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TD; A[Kubernetes] --> B[Orchestration]; A --> C[Management]; D[Docker] --> C; D --> E[Containers]

scenes.text: Conclusion and Future of Docker: Summarize key takeaways and discuss the future potential and evolution of Docker in the field of cloud computing and DevOps.
scenes.image_prompt: graph LR; A[Conclusion] --> B[Key Takeaways]; B --> C[Future Potential]; C --> D[Evolution]
